content:
# See https://pre-commit.com for more information
# See https://pre-commit.com/hooks.html for more hooks

exclude: "third_party/"

repos:
-   repo: https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks
    rev: v3.2.0
    hooks:
    -   id: trailing-whitespace
        exclude: patches/
    -   id: end-of-file-fixer
        exclude: patches/
        exclude_types: ["image", "jupyter"]
    -   id: check-yaml
        exclude: patches/
    -   id: check-json
    -   id: check-merge-conflict
        exclude: patches/

    -   id: check-added-large-files
    -   id: mixed-line-ending
-   repo: https://github.com/psf/black
    rev: 25.11.0
    hooks:
    -   id: black
-   repo: https://github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-clang-format
    rev: 'v18.1.4'
    hooks:
    -   id: clang-format

- repo: https://github.com/hukkin/mdformat
  rev: 0.7.21
  hooks:
  - id: mdformat
    additional_dependencies:
    - mdformat-gfm
    - mdformat-black
    - mdformat-frontmatter

- repo: https://github.com/Lucas-C/pre-commit-hooks
  rev: v1.5.5
  hooks:
  - id: forbid-tabs
    exclude: ".gitmodules|patches/.*|docs/development/git_chores.md|build_tools/packaging/linux/template/debian_rules.j2|third-party/sysdeps/linux/libdrm/patch_source.sh"

- repo: https://github.com/rhysd/actionlint
  rev: v1.7.10
  hooks:
    - id: actionlint
      args: [-shellcheck=, -ignore, 'label ".+" is unknown']

- repo: local
  hooks:
  - id: test-file-naming
    name: Enforce *_test.py naming for build_tools tests
    entry: "Test files must use the *_test.py naming convention, not test_*.py"
    language: fail
    files: '^build_tools/(.*/)?tests/test_[^/]*\.py$'
